title: Real KD dogfood proof for cockpit layout v2
goal: Prove the polished cockpit layout v2 in a real daemon-owned native Pi TUI run, with Herdr used only for observability and submit_worker_result/KD artifacts used as worker truth.
acceptance: Run a real KD native Pi TUI dogfood slice after LAYOUT-04 and document the run id, command, terminal state, cockpit_worker_ready event, worker pane ids/slots, layout observation, result artifact, checks, merge, and final report path.
The evidence shows no unwanted root shell pane and no default Operator column in the v2 cockpit layout, or records any remaining limitation as a blocker before default promotion.
The worker result comes from khazad_worker_submit_worker_result_v1 through a kd_tui_result_artifact path; terminal text and Herdr scrollback are explicitly excluded as correctness evidence.
The proof document states what the dogfood proves and what it does not prove.
must_ask_if: The proof would require treating a screenshot or pane text as correctness evidence.
The dogfood run fails in a way that suggests a layout v2 invariant is wrong rather than a transient Herdr/Pi launch issue.
